title: Herstal Heavy Rain
lead: Herstal is experiencing heavy rain with a Z-Score of -3.09, indicating a significant anomaly. This event has a critical score of 10.0/10, requiring immediate attention.
body:
The heavy rain in Herstal is causing disruptions to daily life, with 90% humidity and wind speeds of 7.9 km/h. 
 The HDD value of 11.8 GG suggests a high heating demand, while the CDD value of 0.0 GG indicates no cooling demand. 
 The critical level of this event necessitates prompt action to mitigate its effects.
conclusion: Activate emergency response protocols immediately to ensure public safety in Herstal.
